items.titleZh: 在非流行区开始利妥昔单抗治疗的类风湿关节炎患者中常规血清学乙肝筛查价值低
items.abstractZh: 利妥昔单抗（RTX）是类风湿关节炎（RA）有效且安全的治疗方法，但与乙型肝炎病毒（HBV）感染再激活风险增加相关。因此，（国际）国家指南建议在开始RTX治疗前进行HBV筛查。然而，在非流行区RA患者中HBV的发病率预计非常低，且已知筛查依从性不佳。本研究旨在评估常规血清学HBV筛查对开始RTX治疗的RA患者的附加诊断价值。这项回顾性单中心队列研究纳入了2012年4月至2024年4月期间所有临床诊断为RA并计划开始RTX的患者。收集了患者和疾病特征、HBV筛查结果以及额外实验室结果的数据。评估了HBV筛查依从性、阳性检测结果（乙肝表面抗原或核心抗体阳性）比例以及HBV再激活发生率。在975名纳入患者中，270名（28%）接受了血清学HBV筛查。其中6名（2.2%）筛查结果阳性，其中3名最终未接受RTX。所有6名患者均有已知的HBV病史或危险因素。开始RTX后（平均随访6.97年），无论是否筛查，均未观察到活动性HBV感染。因此，常规血清学HBV筛查识别出的既往未识别感染极少，并且尽管筛查依从性低，但未发生HBV再激活。因此，在低风险人群中常规血清学HBV筛查似乎多余，应仅用于有已知危险因素的患者。

items.title: The treatment landscape in axial spondyloarthritis-do we need new therapies?
items.abstract: Despite major therapeutic advances, many patients with axial spondyloarthritis (axSpA) fail to achieve remission or even low disease activity with currently available advanced therapies. This highlights an urgent need to understand why treatment responses remain suboptimal and how management can be improved. Several mechanisms contribute to persistent symptoms. Misdiagnosis and overdiagnosis remain frequent, often due to nonspecific imaging findings being misattributed to axSpA. Among correctly diagnosed patients, a substantial proportion experience pain not directly driven by inflammation. Nociplastic pain-frequently associated with fatigue, anxiety, depression, and sleep disturbances-is the predominant mechanism, while neuropathic pain is less common. These patients do not benefit from escalation of anti-inflammatory therapy but instead require tailored approaches addressing nociplastic pain, including structured exercise, cognitive-behavioural therapy, and pharmacological agents. However, robust clinical trial data in axSpA populations are lacking, and studies evaluating these interventions as add-on strategies are urgently needed. A smaller but clinically important subset of patients demonstrates true treatment-refractory (TR) axSpA, with objective inflammation persisting despite multiple biologic or targeted synthetic disease-modifying antirheumatic drugs. Novel therapeutic approaches under investigation include dual-targeted therapy with complementary mechanisms, selective depletion of pathogenic T cells, modulation of the HLA-B27 immunopeptidome through endoplasmic reticulum aminopeptidase 1/2 inhibition, and blockade of macrophage migration inhibitory factor. The primary challenge in axSpA today-besides the problem of the correct diagnosis-is to optimise the use of existing therapies for pain not related to inflammation, while simultaneously developing innovative options for TR disease. Together, these efforts will determine whether remission can become an attainable goal for all patients.

items.titleZh: 中轴型脊柱关节炎的治疗格局——我们需要新的疗法吗？
items.abstractZh: 尽管治疗取得了重大进展，许多中轴型脊柱关节炎（axSpA）患者在使用当前可用的先进疗法后仍未能达到缓解甚至低疾病活动度。这凸显了理解治疗反应为何仍不理想以及如何改善管理的迫切需求。多种机制导致持续症状。误诊和过度诊断仍然常见，通常是由于非特异性影像学发现被错误归因于axSpA。在正确诊断的患者中，相当一部分人经历的疼痛并非直接由炎症驱动。伤害可塑性疼痛——常伴有疲劳、焦虑、抑郁和睡眠障碍——是主要机制，而神经病理性疼痛较少见。这些患者不会从抗炎治疗的升级中获益，而是需要针对伤害可塑性疼痛的定制方法，包括结构化运动、认知行为疗法和药物。然而，在axSpA人群中缺乏强有力的临床试验数据，迫切需要评估这些干预措施作为附加策略的研究。一个较小但临床重要的亚组患者表现出真正的难治性（TR）axSpA，尽管使用了多种生物制剂或靶向合成改善病情抗风湿药，客观炎症仍持续存在。正在研究的新型治疗方法包括具有互补机制的双靶向治疗、选择性清除致病性T细胞、通过内质网氨基肽酶1/2抑制调节HLA-B27免疫肽组，以及阻断巨噬细胞迁移抑制因子。如今axSpA的主要挑战——除了正确诊断的问题——是优化现有疗法用于非炎症相关疼痛，同时为TR疾病开发创新选择。这些努力将共同决定缓解是否能成为所有患者可实现的目标。

items.title: Racial and ethnic representation in systemic sclerosis clinical trials: a 25-year analysis of ClinicalTrials.gov (1999-2025).
items.abstract: This study aimed to quantify reporting of race and ethnicity in systemic sclerosis (SSc) clinical trials, characterise geographic distribution, and assess participant representation relative to US population benchmarks. We conducted a cross-sectional analysis of registered SSc trials with enrolment data. Of 699 trials screened, 95 met initial criteria; after excluding 21 terminated and 4 non-SSc studies, 70 completed trials (n = 4956 participants) were analysed. We summarised the prevalence of race/ethnicity reporting and calculated race/ethnicity distributions among participants with available data. US Census estimates were used for contextual comparison. Trials were also grouped by recruiting continent. Among 70 trials, 39 (55.7%) reported race and 26 (37.1%) reported ethnicity; 25 reported both, while 30 (42.9%) reported neither. Participant-level data were available for 3161 individuals for race (60.0% of all enrollees) and 2255 for ethnicity (47.1%). Among those with race reported, 78.5% were White (n = 2482), 12.7% Asian (n = 400), 4.9% Black or African American (n = 155), 1.4% multiracial (n = 45), 0.6% American Indian/Alaska Native (n = 18), and 0.3% Native Hawaiian/Other Pacific Islander (n = 8); 1.7% were unknown/unreported (n = 53). Of participants with ethnicity data (n = 2335), 10.9% were Hispanic/Latino, 86.6% not Hispanic/Latino, and 2.5% unknown/unreported. Trial activity was concentrated in North America (39.2%) and Europe (36.3%), with additional activity in Asia (16.6%); South America, Oceania, and Africa contributed smaller shares. Race/ethnicity reporting in SSc trials is incomplete, and available data reveal disproportionate underenrolment of Black and Hispanic/Latino participants relative to US population benchmarks. Standardised reporting and intentional, equity-focused recruitment are needed to enhance representativeness and interpretability of SSc trial findings.

items.title: Clinical outcomes of patients with diffuse large B-cell lymphoma and concomitant rheumatoid arthritis: a nationwide Danish register-based cohort study.
items.abstract: This register-based cohort study aimed to investigate clinical cancer outcomes in patients with rheumatoid arthritis (RA) who develop diffuse large B-cell lymphoma (DLBCL) compared with those in patients without RA but with DLBCL. The study included all patients with RA and DLBCL aged ≥18 years in the Danish National Lymphoma Registry who received first-line treatment between January 1, 2006, and May 21, 2022. RA diagnoses (exposure) and patients without RA (comparator) at the time of DLBCL diagnosis were identified through linkage with the Danish Rheumatology Quality Register and the Danish National Patient Registry. Patients were followed up from DLBCL treatment initiation until emigration, death, outcomes of interest, or May 21, 2022. Hazard ratios (HRs) and 95% CIs were estimated for outcomes including overall survival (OS), progression-free survival (PFS), and hospital admissions. The final study cohort included 136 patients with RA and 5372 without RA. Adjusted HRs for OS and PFS in patients with RA were 1.02 (95% CI, 0.74-1.39) and 0.86 (95% CI, 0.65-1.14), respectively, compared with those of patients without RA. Two-year OS was 81.9% in patients with RA and 77.8% in those without RA, with 2-year PFS of 72.6% and 72.4%, respectively. For other outcomes, HRs were <1 for patients with RA, with a statistically significant reduction in hospital admissions: 0.56 (95% CI, 0.44-0.72) in adjusted calculations. In conclusion, patients with RA and DLBCL did not experience worse survival outcomes or increased hospitalisation rate during therapy.

items.titleZh: 弥漫大B细胞淋巴瘤合并类风湿关节炎患者的临床结局：一项基于丹麦全国登记数据库的队列研究
items.abstractZh: 这项基于登记数据库的队列研究旨在探讨类风湿关节炎（RA）患者发生弥漫大B细胞淋巴瘤（DLBCL）后的临床癌症结局，并与无RA的DLBCL患者进行比较。研究纳入丹麦国家淋巴瘤登记数据库中所有年龄≥18岁、在2006年1月1日至2022年5月21日期间接受一线治疗的RA合并DLBCL患者。通过丹麦风湿病质量登记库和丹麦国家患者登记库的关联，确定DLBCL诊断时的RA患者（暴露组）和无RA患者（对照组）。患者从DLBCL治疗开始随访至移民、死亡、发生结局事件或2022年5月21日。评估总生存期（OS）、无进展生存期（PFS）和住院等结局的风险比（HR）及95%置信区间（CI）。最终研究队列包括136例RA患者和5372例无RA患者。与无RA患者相比，RA患者的OS和PFS调整后HR分别为1.02（95% CI, 0.74-1.39）和0.86（95% CI, 0.65-1.14）。RA患者2年OS为81.9%，无RA患者为77.8%；2年PFS分别为72.6%和72.4%。对于其他结局，RA患者的HR均<1，其中住院率显著降低：调整后HR为0.56（95% CI, 0.44-0.72）。结论：RA合并DLBCL患者在治疗期间并未出现更差的生存结局或住院率增加。

items.title: Patients' coping strategies in the first 2 years of rheumatoid arthritis: a qualitative study.
items.abstract: Rheumatoid arthritis (RA) is a chronic disease that requires lifelong medication and self-management. Few studies have explored the coping strategies patients use to make life manageable after an RA diagnosis, and how these strategies function in the adaptive process of living with RA. The aim was to describe coping strategies patients with RA use to manage everyday life during the first 2 years after diagnosis. A purposeful sample of 22 patients, each with a disease duration of 12 to 20 months, participated in interviews conducted either in focus groups or individually. The study used an abductive qualitative content analysis combining inductive identification of coping strategies with deductive categorisation. The analysis revealed various coping strategies and their functions, which were categorised into 10 subcategories and 3 categories. They represented the adaptive processes used by patients to coordinate actions and contingencies within their environment, rely on available social resources, and align preferences with available options. During the early years with RA and modern medical care, patients expressed the need to use various coping strategies to manage everyday life. The strategies varied depending on the patient's life situation and context and ranged from making a mental effort, to accepting and adjusting their mindset, to planning and finding solutions.

items.titleZh: 类风湿关节炎患者确诊后前两年的应对策略：一项定性研究
items.abstractZh: 类风湿关节炎（RA）是一种需要终身用药和自我管理的慢性疾病。很少有研究探讨患者在确诊RA后为使生活可控而使用的应对策略，以及这些策略在适应RA生活过程中的作用。本研究旨在描述RA患者在确诊后前两年内用于管理日常生活的应对策略。采用目的性抽样，选取22名病程为12至20个月的患者，通过焦点小组或个人访谈进行数据收集。研究采用溯因定性内容分析法，结合归纳识别应对策略与演绎分类。分析揭示了多种应对策略及其功能，并将其归类为10个亚类和3个类别。这些策略代表了患者用于协调环境中的行动与偶发事件、依赖可用社会资源以及将偏好与可用选项对齐的适应过程。在RA早期和现代医疗条件下，患者表示需要使用多种应对策略来管理日常生活。策略因患者的生活状况和背景而异，范围从心理努力、接受和调整心态，到计划和寻找解决方案。

items.title: A case of adult-onset Still disease complicated by macrophage activation syndrome and toxic epidermal necrolysis.
items.abstract: A 56-year-old woman with 1-year recurrent fever, rash, joint swelling (acute exacerbation) was diagnosed with adult-onset Still disease (AOSD) per 1992 Yamaguchi criteria. She initially improved with methylprednisolone, tocilizumab, methotrexate, and iguratimod but relapsed after discontinuing methylprednisolone. Twenty-four hours after first Re Du Ning injection, she developed progressive rash (extensive polymorphic erythema, bullae, and >30% body surface epidermal detachment), high fever, organ impairment, and coagulopathy and was diagnosed with AOSD complicated by macrophage activation syndrome (2004 haemophagocytic lymphohistiocytosis guidelines), toxic epidermal necrolysis, myocardial injury, hepatic impairment, and disseminated intravascular coagulation. Treatment included dexamethasone, methylprednisolone, plasma exchange, cyclosporine, anakinra, ganciclovir, voriconazole, intravenous immunoglobulin, and supportive care, leading to marked improvement in lesions. This case highlights rare AOSD complications and anakinra's efficacy.

items.titleZh: 成人斯蒂尔病并发巨噬细胞活化综合征和中毒性表皮坏死松解症一例
items.abstractZh: 一名56岁女性，有1年反复发热、皮疹、关节肿胀（急性加重）病史，根据1992年Yamaguchi标准诊断为成人斯蒂尔病（AOSD）。她最初使用甲泼尼龙、托珠单抗、甲氨蝶呤和艾拉莫德治疗后改善，但在停用甲泼尼龙后复发。首次注射热毒宁后24小时，她出现进行性皮疹（广泛多形性红斑、水疱，>30%体表面积表皮剥脱）、高热、器官损伤和凝血功能障碍，诊断为AOSD并发巨噬细胞活化综合征（2004年噬血细胞性淋巴组织细胞增多症指南）、中毒性表皮坏死松解症、心肌损伤、肝损伤和弥散性血管内凝血。治疗包括地塞米松、甲泼尼龙、血浆置换、环孢素、阿那白滞素、更昔洛韦、伏立康唑、静脉注射免疫球蛋白和支持治疗，导致皮损显著改善。本病例强调了罕见的AOSD并发症和阿那白滞素的疗效。

items.title: Unusual Case of Granulomatosis with Polyangiitis Complicated with Hormographilella aspergillata Skin Infection.
items.abstract: Granulomatosis with polyangiitis (GPA) is a rare ANCA-associated small-vessel vasculitis that predominantly affects the respiratory tract and kidneys, while cutaneous manifestations occur less frequently. Opportunistic fungal infections complicating GPA are uncommon, particularly involving rare filamentous basidiomycetes. We describe a 32-year-old male with a prolonged history of crusting rhinitis, tinnitus, and progressive nodular and ulcerative skin lesions on the trunk and extremities, accompanied by fever and lower limb edema. Laboratory evaluation revealed elevated inflammatory markers and positive c-ANCA (anti-PR3). Histopathology demonstrated granulomatous inflammation consistent with GPA. The clinical course was complicated by a secondary cutaneous infection caused by Hormographiella aspergillata, isolated from a skin lesion. Initial antifungal therapy with itraconazole was ineffective; subsequent treatment with voriconazole resulted in resolution of the fungal infection. The patient was then successfully treated with systemic immunosuppressive therapy, achieving long-term remission. To our knowledge, this is the first reported case of GPA complicated by a cutaneous infection with H. aspergillata. This case highlights the diagnostic challenges of GPA with atypical skin manifestations and underscores the importance of microbiological evaluation of skin lesions prior to initiating aggressive immunosuppressive therapy. KEYWORDS: granulomatosis with polyangiitis; ANCA-associated vasculitis; Hormographiella aspergillata; opportunistic fungal infection Granulomatosis with polyangiitis (GPA), formerly Wegener's granulomatosis, is a necrotizing granulomatous vasculitis affecting small to medium-sized blood vessels and belonging to the group of ANCA-associated vasculitides (AAV) (1). The disease is characterized by granulomatous inflammation, necrotizing vasculitis, and the presence of antineutrophil cytoplasmic antibodies, most commonly proteinase-3 ANCA (PR3-ANCA) (2). GPA may involve virtually any organ system, with predominant involvement of the upper and lower respiratory tract and kidneys (3). Cutaneous manifestations are reported in approximately 30-50% of patients and are usually associated with systemic disease activity (4). Opportunistic infections may complicate the course of GPA, particularly in the context of delayed diagnosis or immunosuppressive therapy. Infections caused by rare filamentous fungi such as Hormographiella (H) aspergillata are exceptionally rare and have predominantly been reported in immunocompromised patients with hematological malignancies (5, 6). A 32-year-old male was admitted with multiple painful ulcerations and nodules on the trunk and extremities, accompanied by high fever and marked bilateral lower limb edema. Four months before admission, nodular lesions on the left auricle and right nipple regressed spontaneously after purulent discharge. Six weeks prior to referral, painless nodules on the back and right upper arm were surgically incised and treated with antibiotics, followed by clinical deterioration with fever, progressive ulcerations, and painful swelling of the feet and ankles (figures 1a and !b). The patient had a two-year history of nasal obstruction, crusting rhinitis, and intermittent right-sided tinnitus. Rhinoscopy revealed mucosal thickening and septal perforation with crusts and synechiae. Dermatological examination showed deep ulcerations with yellow-brown crusts on the back, right upper arm, and left cheek (figures 1a and 1b). Laboratory evaluation demonstrated elevated inflammatory markers (ESR 76 mm/h, CRP 47.4 mg/L), hypoalbuminemia, and positive c-ANCA (anti-PR3). Initial microbiological cultures were sterile. Histopathology revealed granulomatous panniculitis with abscess formation. Fungal culture isolated H. aspergillata. Itraconazole therapy was ineffective; subsequent voriconazole treatment led to complete resolution of the cutaneous infection. Due to persistent systemic inflammation and c-ANCA positivity, the patient was treated with high-dose glucocorticoids and cyclophosphamide, which gradually led to completely remission of skin lesions (figure 2). Renal involvement developed during treatment, manifested as proteinuria. Long-term immunosuppressive therapy resulted in sustained remission with mild residual renal impairment. GPA is a rare multisystem autoimmune disease with heterogeneous clinical presentation, often leading to delayed diagnosis. Cutaneous involvement may be the initial manifestation and includes purpura, nodules, necrosis, and ulcerations, reflecting underlying vasculitis and granulomatous processes (2). In our patient, prominent skin lesions preceded the diagnosis by several months and contributed to diagnostic uncertainty. Opportunistic infections are a recognized complication in GPA, particularly following immunosuppression; however, fungal infections caused by filamentous basidiomycetes are exceedingly rare (5, 6). Hormographiella aspergillata, the anamorphic form of Coprinopsis cinerea, is an environmental fungus that has been implicated almost exclusively in invasive infections in patients with hematological malignancies, with reported mortality rates up to 70% (5, 6). To our knowledge, no previous case of GPA complicated by cutaneous infection with H. aspergillata has been reported. The present case underscores the importance of thorough microbiological evaluation of atypical or non-healing skin lesions in patients with suspected systemic vasculitis, particularly before initiation of intensive immunosuppressive therapy. Failure to recognize opportunistic infections may lead to significant morbidity and mortality. This case emphasizes the crucial role of dermatologists in the early recognition of systemic vasculitis presenting with skin manifestations. Comprehensive clinical, histological, and microbiological assessment is essential to establish the correct diagnosis and to identify rare infectious complications. Multidisciplinary management and careful monitoring are necessary to achieve long-term remission and to minimize treatment-related complications.

items.title: Qualitative study to explore self-management strategies in severe systemic lupus erythematosus.
items.abstract: Self-management in systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) is an emerging concept aimed at empowering individuals in their disease journey. However, qualitative exploration of self-management strategies in severe SLE is limited. This study aimed to describe self-management strategies used by individuals with severe SLE to inform educational initiatives. This is a descriptive qualitative study involving focus groups of participants with severe SLE (high disease activity status) recruited from the Australian Lupus Registry and Biobank. Data were thematically analysed using inductive and deductive techniques. Three focus groups were conducted involving 14 participants, with a median age of 39.5 years. Six key themes were identified: emotional and psychological coping, physical activity management, dietary modifications, support systems, personalisation of treatment, and barriers to health care. Emotional and psychological coping strategies were critical for managing SLE uncertainties, including maintaining a positive outlook, accepting the diagnosis, and leveraging social support. Physical activity, although challenging, was essential, with participants advocating for gentle, consistent exercise balanced with rest. Dietary adjustments, such as reducing processed foods and increasing whole foods, were widely adopted for symptom control. Support systems, particularly advocacy groups, reduced isolation and provided practical advice. Notably, engagement with health management tools (eg, symptom trackers and digital applications) was absent, indicating a gap in awareness or accessibility. Limited discussion of other health events, such as infections, surgeries, or vaccinations, highlighted additional areas requiring attention. This study provides insights into the self-management strategies of individuals with severe SLE and underscores the need for tailored education and tools to enhance disease management across the lifespan.

items.titleZh: 严重系统性红斑狼疮自我管理策略的定性研究
items.abstractZh: 系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）的自我管理是一个新兴概念，旨在增强患者在疾病过程中的自主能力。然而，关于严重SLE自我管理策略的定性探索有限。本研究旨在描述严重SLE患者使用的自我管理策略，为教育举措提供依据。这是一项描述性定性研究，涉及从澳大利亚狼疮登记处和生物库招募的严重SLE（高疾病活动状态）参与者焦点小组。采用归纳和演绎技术对数据进行主题分析。共进行了3个焦点小组，涉及14名参与者，中位年龄为39.5岁。确定了六个关键主题：情绪和心理应对、体力活动管理、饮食调整、支持系统、治疗个体化以及医疗保健障碍。情绪和心理应对策略对于管理SLE的不确定性至关重要，包括保持积极态度、接受诊断以及利用社会支持。体力活动虽然具有挑战性，但必不可少，参与者主张进行温和、持续的运动并与休息保持平衡。饮食调整，如减少加工食品和增加全食物，被广泛用于症状控制。支持系统，特别是倡导团体，减少了孤立感并提供了实用建议。值得注意的是，健康管理工具（如症状追踪器和数字应用程序）的使用缺失，表明在意识或可及性方面存在差距。对其他健康事件（如感染、手术或疫苗接种）的讨论有限，突显了需要关注的额外领域。本研究提供了对严重SLE患者自我管理策略的见解，并强调了需要量身定制的教育和工具，以在整个生命周期中加强疾病管理。

items.title: Update on therapeutic approaches in ANCA-associated vasculitis.
items.abstract: Standard-of-care therapy for antineutrophil cytoplasmic antibody-associated vasculitis (AAV) remains dependent on glucocorticoids (GCs) and immune suppression, especially rituximab, but patient outcomes are directly affected by only partial efficacy in controlling active disease, high levels of toxicity, and risks for subsequent relapse. GC dosing has been optimised in randomised controlled trials and the complement inhibitor, avacopan, introduced as an alternative to GCs. Improved understanding of the inflammatory and immune dysregulation in AAV has provided many cytokine, complement, and B cell targets, which are driving new drug development.

items.title: Patient perspectives on glucocorticoid-associated complications and sequelae in ANCA-associated vasculitis.
items.abstract: Glucocorticoids (GC) are not only a cornerstone in the treatment of antineutrophil cytoplasmatic antibodies-associated vasculitis (AAV) but also add to morbidity and mortality. Previously, we investigated GC-related adverse events (GCAE) in AAV using objective, physician-facing tools. The present study focuses on the patients' perspective of GC treatment. We included patients with a confirmed diagnosis of AAV in this monocentric study. Data were collected by a structured interview and 2 questionnaires regarding therapy strategies to reduce GC exposure and the relevance of individual GC side effects. We compared the findings with the Glucocorticoid Toxicity Index (GTI) 2.0. Of 138 patients recruited, 79.7% reported GCAE moon face, weight gain, and skin alterations being the foremost present. Positive effects were reported by 91.3%, predominantly pain reduction and rapid improvement of general health. In 39.1%, patients reported that positive aspects outweighed the negative ones. General impacts on everyday life were present in 49.3% with more negative than positive impacts (31.2% vs 21.7%, P = .019). Knowledge regarding GC side effects was present in 91.3%. Treatment strategies to reduce GC exposure were generally endorsed by patients. The disease activity had no significant impact on the patients' perception. Patients reporting more negative GC-related aspects had a significantly higher GTI cumulative worsening score. GC therapy has a significant impact on AAV patients regarding both medical condition and everyday life. We found ambiguous patient opinions regarding GC therapy with a variety of negative and positive aspects. AAV patients strongly support efforts to develop strategies to reduce GC exposure.

items.title: Interdisciplinary Clinical Practice Guidelines for patient-centred management of juvenile-onset systemic lupus erythematosus.
items.abstract: To develop updated interdisciplinary clinical practice guidelines for the management of juvenile-onset systemic lupus erythematosus (jSLE) in a patient-centred, treat-to-target (T2T) approach. Recommendations were developed based on T2T principles around shared decision-making by a multidisciplinary team of experts including paediatric and adult rheumatologists, paediatric nephrologists, neurologists, cardiologists, pneumologists, radiologists, immunologists, and infectious disease specialists, geneticists, and ophthalmologists from Germany, Switzerland, Austria, the United Kingdom and Ireland, a psychologist, and a patient representative. The process followed the standard operating procedures of the German AWMF (Association of the Scientific Medical Societies in Germany). The team conducted an extensive literature review (2012-2024) of 40 clinically selected Population/Intervention/Comparison/Outcome questions. Overarching principles (OAP), overarching treatment strategies (OATS), and recommendations were formulated and explored in 2 online preconsensus meeting Delphi surveys with the experts. The results were discussed in 3 virtual consensus meetings using a modified nominal group technique to discuss, modify and vote on the OAP, OATS, and recommendations. All final document was approved by 2 external reviewers and the AWMF. We reached consensus on 45 recommendations on the general assessment, diagnosis, monitoring, nonpharmacologic, and pharmacologic management of jSLE. We highlight organ-specific manifestations, such as central nervous system disease, jSLE-related antiphospholipid antibody syndrome, and juvenile lupus nephritis, and consider disease severity for treatment recommendations. We have developed updated interdisciplinary clinical practice guidelines to facilitate a patient-centred T2T approach to the management of patients with jSLE.

items.titleZh: 青少年发病系统性红斑狼疮以患者为中心的管理的跨学科临床实践指南
items.abstractZh: 制定更新的跨学科临床实践指南，以患者为中心、达标治疗（T2T）方法管理青少年发病系统性红斑狼疮（jSLE）。建议基于T2T原则围绕共同决策制定，由多学科专家团队包括来自德国、瑞士、奥地利、英国和爱尔兰的儿科和成人风湿病学家、儿科肾脏病学家、神经病学家、心脏病学家、肺病学家、放射学家、免疫学家和传染病专家、遗传学家和眼科医生，以及一名心理学家和一名患者代表。流程遵循德国科学医学学会协会（AWMF）的标准操作程序。团队对40个临床选择的患者/干预/比较/结局问题进行了广泛的文献回顾（2012-2024年）。制定了总体原则（OAP）、总体治疗策略（OATS）和建议，并在2次在线预共识会议德尔菲调查中与专家进行了探讨。结果在3次虚拟共识会议中使用改良名义小组技术进行讨论、修改和投票，以确定OAP、OATS和建议。最终文件由2名外部评审员和AWMF批准。我们就jSLE的一般评估、诊断、监测、非药物和药物管理达成了45条建议的共识。我们强调了器官特异性表现，如中枢神经系统疾病、jSLE相关抗磷脂抗体综合征和青少年狼疮肾炎，并根据疾病严重程度制定治疗建议。我们制定了更新的跨学科临床实践指南，以促进以患者为中心的T2T方法管理jSLE患者。

items.title: The association between ethnicity, socioeconomic position and outcomes following initiation of methotrexate in juvenile idiopathic arthritis.
items.abstract: This analysis investigates changes in disease activity and treatment persistence following initiation of methotrexate in children and young people with juvenile idiopathic arthritis (JIA), by ethnic group and socioeconomic position. Patients registered in the UK JIA Biologics Register starting methotrexate were included. Outcomes included a change in disease activity between treatment commencement and 6 months. Adjusted multivariable linear regression was used to assess the association between ethnicity or socioeconomic position. Treatment persistence was analysed using Kaplan-Meier estimates. Cox proportional hazards models were used to compare drug persistence between groups. A total of 993 patients were included; 69% women, 88% White ethnic group (2% Mixed, 8% Asian, and 2% Black), and 24% in the most deprived socioeconomic group. Disease activity improved after 6 months for most children. There was no evidence that improvement differed by ethnicity or socioeconomic position.The proportion of patients remaining on methotrexate at 12 months varied by ethnic group (61% of children with White ethnicity, 64% Asian, 65% Black, and 67% of children with Mixed ethnicity). The likelihood of stopping methotrexate over the 12-month period was similar between ethnicities and socioeconomic groups. Improvements in disease activity in the first 6 months following initiation of methotrexate in children and young people with JIA are similar between ethnic groups and independent of socioeconomic position. Although small sample sizes limit robust conclusions, further research to understand whether differences are seen following initiation of other therapies for JIA and the drivers of these differences is warranted.

items.title: Differential joint-level response to secukinumab in psoriatic arthritis: A collaborative European observational cohort study.
items.abstract: To investigate possible variations in treatment response to secukinumab at distinct anatomic joint locations in patients with psoriatic arthritis (PsA) in routine clinical care. Patients with PsA monitored in 9 registries contributing to the European Spondyloarthritis Research Collaboration Network were included in this study if at least 1 joint from the 28-joint count was clinically swollen at the start of treatment with secukinumab. The primary outcome was time to first resolution of clinical joint swelling at each joint location, excluding the shoulder, during a follow-up of 2 years. Estimated hazard ratios (HRs) for resolution between different joint locations were compared with interval-censored mixed-effects transformation models adjusted for age, sex, and previous biologic/targeted synthetic disease-modifying antirheumatic drug (DMARD). A total of 590 patients with 2794 swollen joints at the initiation of secukinumab were included (mean [SD] age 51.7 [12.3] years, 54% female patients, 77% co-treatment with conventional synthetic DMARDs). Compared with the wrist, the elbow had a higher rate of resolution of joint swelling (HR = 1.75, 95% CI = 1.10-2.79). The metacarpophalangeal joints (MCP) 4 and 5 (HR = 2.01, 95% CI = 1.40-2.88 and HR = 1.98, 95% CI = 1.28-3.06, respectively), as well as most proximal interphalangeal joints (PIP), except PIP3, had a higher rate of resolution compared with the wrist. No significant difference in the resolution of joint swelling was found for the wrist compared with MCP2, MCP3, PIP3, and the knee. In PsA, the time to resolution of joint swelling after initiation of secukinumab differs between distinct joint locations.

items.titleZh: 银屑病关节炎中司库奇尤单抗的关节水平差异性反应：一项欧洲合作观察性队列研究
items.abstractZh: 旨在探讨在常规临床实践中，银屑病关节炎（PsA）患者不同解剖关节部位对司库奇尤单抗治疗反应的潜在差异。本研究纳入欧洲脊柱关节炎研究协作网络9个登记处监测的PsA患者，这些患者在开始司库奇尤单抗治疗时，28个关节计数中至少有一个关节出现临床肿胀。主要结局是在2年随访期间，每个关节部位（不包括肩关节）首次出现临床关节肿胀消退的时间。采用经年龄、性别和既往生物制剂/靶向合成改善病情抗风湿药（DMARD）调整的区间删失混合效应转换模型，比较不同关节部位之间肿胀消退的估计风险比（HR）。共纳入590例患者，在司库奇尤单抗起始治疗时有2794个肿胀关节（平均[SD]年龄51.7[12.3]岁，54%为女性，77%联合使用传统合成DMARD）。与腕关节相比，肘关节的关节肿胀消退率更高（HR=1.75，95%CI=1.10-2.79）。第4和第5掌指关节（MCP）（HR=2.01，95%CI=1.40-2.88和HR=1.98，95%CI=1.28-3.06）以及大多数近端指间关节（PIP）（除PIP3外）的肿胀消退率均高于腕关节。腕关节与MCP2、MCP3、PIP3和膝关节的肿胀消退率无显著差异。在PsA中，开始司库奇尤单抗治疗后不同关节部位的关节肿胀消退时间存在差异。

items.title: Patients' perspectives of eosinophilic granulomatosis with polyangiitis within the context of a clinical trial.
items.abstract: Eosinophilic granulomatosis with polyangiitis (EGPA) is a complex, multisystem form of vasculitis. MANDARA (NCT04157348) was a phase 3 clinical trial comparing the efficacy and safety of benralizumab versus mepolizumab, in addition to standard of care, for relapsing/refractory EGPA. This qualitative interview substudy explored study participants' experiences with EGPA and their participation in the trial. Thirty-eight patients from 5 countries participating in MANDARA opted into a longitudinal qualitative substudy, which comprised two 60-minute, semistructured, one-to-one telephone interviews conducted by trained interviewers between December 2019 and June 2023. Topics discussed included motivation to join the trial, time since diagnosis, symptoms, and impacts of EGPA and their degree of 'bothersomeness' and 'disturbance'. The desire to stop or reduce the use of oral glucocorticoids was the most frequently mentioned motivation for, and expectation of, participation in the trial. Comparison of interviews between the 2 time points suggested patients experienced reductions in the number and impact of EGPA-related symptoms and bothersomeness and/or disturbance ratings. Most improved symptoms included difficulty breathing, nasal congestion/discharge, and fatigue, and most improved impacts included ability to exercise, quality/quantity of sleep, and ability to engage in social activities. This study provides insights regarding patients' perspectives of EGPA and their perceptions and experiences associated with receiving an anti-interleukin-5/receptor therapy. These findings highlight the need for effective treatments that allow patients to reduce their use of oral glucocorticoids and the importance of assessing patient experiences when gauging treatment efficacy in EGPA.

items.title: Individualised treatment effect prediction: the benefit of initial biological treatment in early rheumatoid arthritis.
items.abstract: Initiating biologics upfront in early disease-modifying antirheumatic drugs (DMARDs)-naïve rheumatoid arthritis (RA) may benefit selected patients more than starting with methotrexate (MTX) monotherapy. Current guidelines recommend using prognostic markers to define high-risk groups for early biological treatment. Predictive models combining these markers could better identify individuals likely to benefit. This study aimed to develop and validate models predicting the benefit of starting tocilizumab (TCZ) plus MTX over MTX alone in early DMARD-naïve RA. We used data from the FUNCTION trial (NCT01007435, n = 856) for model development and U-Act-Early (NCT01034137, n = 299) for validation. Models predicted 6-month time-averaged Clinical Disease Activity Index (CDAI) benefit of TCZ + MTX vs MTX alone using the following 2 approaches: (1) imputation of the unobserved counterfactual outcome, followed by prediction of the individual treatment effect; and (2) direct modelling with linear regression including treatment-covariate interactions. Model performance was evaluated via discrimination, calibration, and simulated clinical impact. Both models aligned with observed outcomes. In U-Act-Early, patients selected by the models for TCZ + MTX had an average CDAI reduction compared with MTX alone of 7 points, compared with 3 points in those not selected. The number needed to treat (NNT) to achieve an average CDAI ≤22 (below high disease activity) over 6 months was 12 for the full trial population and 5 in model-selected patients. Our prediction models identified early patients with RA more likely to benefit from initiating TCZ + MTX over MTX monotherapy, reducing the NNT to a clinically acceptable threshold of 5.

items.title: Which are the clinical characteristics that lead to the decision of primary or secondary usage of TNFi or IL-17i in patients with axial spondyloarthritis?: Real-world evidence from the RABBIT-SpA cohort.
items.abstract: Assessment of Spondyloarthritis International Society (ASAS)-EULAR treatment recommendations for axial spondyloarthritis (axSpA) suggest advanced therapies after failure of nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory drugs. However, there is insufficient evidence about the best treatment sequence. The primary objective of this study was to analyse the choice of first-/second-line biological disease-modifying antirheumatic drug (bDMARD) treatment as prescribed in routine rheumatology care and to compare patient and disease characteristics at the beginning of first/second bDMARD. bDMARD-naïve patients from the prospective German RABBIT-SpA registry initiating their first tumour necrosis factor inhibitor (TNFi) or interleukin-17i (IL-17i) were eligible. Characteristics at beginning of first-/second-line therapy were compared between the 2 groups. First line: 848 of 1006 patients were treated with TNFi; 158 with IL-17i. Significant differences were found in regard to extramusculoskeletal manifestations (EMMs): psoriasis/uveitis/inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) in 14%/10%/none of IL-17i compared with 7%/14%/5% of TNFi patients. Disease activity, joint count (JC), and patient-reported outcomes were not statistically significant different. Second line: in 289 patients (of those 248 with TNFi, 41 with IL-17i first line), second-line data were available. Of the 248 TNFi first-line patients, 179 (76%) cycled to a second TNFi, whereas 58 (25%) switched to IL-17i. Switchers had significantly higher JC and enthesitis counts. Axial Spondyloarthritis Disease Activity Score did not differ. Significant differences were again found in EMMs: psoriasis/uveitis/IBD in 16%/7%/5% of IL-17i compared with 9%/13%/9% of TNFi patients. Cycler experienced more often secondary failure, switcher more often primary failure in their first-line TNFi. As recommended in ASAS-EULAR recommendations, EMMs in particular are taken into account in routine care for the treatment decision in first-/second-line bDMARD.

items.titleZh: 哪些临床特征导致中轴型脊柱关节炎患者决定一线或二线使用TNFi或IL-17i？：来自RABBIT-SpA队列的真实世界证据。
items.abstractZh: 国际脊柱关节炎评估协会（ASAS）-EULAR关于中轴型脊柱关节炎（axSpA）的治疗建议推荐在非甾体抗炎药治疗失败后使用先进疗法。然而，关于最佳治疗顺序的证据尚不充分。本研究的主要目的是分析常规风湿病治疗中处方的一线/二线生物疾病修饰抗风湿药（bDMARD）选择，并比较开始使用第一/第二种bDMARD时的患者和疾病特征。来自前瞻性德国RABBIT-SpA登记处的bDMARD初治患者，开始使用第一种肿瘤坏死因子抑制剂（TNFi）或白细胞介素-17抑制剂（IL-17i）的患者符合条件。比较两组患者在一线/二线治疗开始时的特征。一线：1006名患者中有848名接受了TNFi治疗；158名接受了IL-17i治疗。在关节外表现（EMMs）方面发现显著差异：IL-17i组中银屑病/葡萄膜炎/炎症性肠病（IBD）的比例分别为14%/10%/无，而TNFi组分别为7%/14%/5%。疾病活动度、关节计数（JC）和患者报告结局无统计学显著差异。二线：在289名患者中（其中248名一线使用TNFi，41名一线使用IL-17i），可获得二线数据。在248名一线TNFi患者中，179名（76%）循环使用第二种TNFi，而58名（25%）转换为IL-17i。转换者的JC和附着点炎计数显著更高。中轴型脊柱关节炎疾病活动度评分无差异。在EMMs方面再次发现显著差异：IL-17i组中银屑病/葡萄膜炎/IBD的比例分别为16%/7%/5%，而TNFi组分别为9%/13%/9%。循环者在一线TNFi中更常出现继发性失败，转换者更常出现原发性失败。正如ASAS-EULAR建议所推荐的，在常规治疗中，EMMs尤其被纳入一线/二线bDMARD治疗决策的考虑因素。

items.title: Management of systemic lupus erythematosus with kidney involvement: systematic literature review to inform the 2025 update of EULAR recommendations.
items.abstract: To identify, appraise, and synthesise current evidence regarding the management of systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) with kidney involvement towards informing the 2025 update of the European Alliance of Associations for Rheumatology (EULAR) recommendations. The Task Force formulated 11 research questions grouped into 6 distinct sections, namely indications of diagnostic kidney biopsy; treatment targets; efficacy and safety of immune treatments in lupus nephritis (LN); efficacy and safety of nonimmune treatments; treatment duration; and indications for repeat kidney biopsy. A dedicated systematic literature review (SLR) was performed for each section. SLRs were performed in PubMed, Embase, and the Cochrane Central Register of Controlled Trials from January 2019 to March 2024. Patients with SLE with low-grade proteinuria (<500-1000 mg/d) and/or haematuria may have histologically active disease, based on evidence of moderate quality. Observational studies of good quality have demonstrated an association between complete or partial renal response within the first 6 to 12 months and long-term kidney survival. A combination of 2 immunosuppressive agents, such as belimumab with mycophenolate mofetil (MMF)/cyclophosphamide, voclosporin with MMF, or obinutuzumab with MMF, is associated with higher response rates, based on high-quality randomised controlled trials (RCTs). Discontinuation of treatment has been linked with an increased risk of relapse, as evidenced by 3 RCTs with substantial heterogeneity. High-quality RCTs indicate a benefit from combination treatments compared with previous standard-of-care in LN. Patients who respond within the first year of treatment tend to have better long-term outcomes. Kidney biopsy is essential for diagnosis, but the role of repeat biopsy awaits confirmation from higher-quality studies.

items.titleZh: 系统性红斑狼疮伴肾脏受累的管理：为2025年EULAR建议更新提供信息的系统文献综述
items.abstractZh: 旨在识别、评估和综合关于系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）伴肾脏受累管理的当前证据，为2025年欧洲风湿病协会联盟（EULAR）建议的更新提供信息。工作组制定了11个研究问题，分为6个不同部分，即诊断性肾活检的指征；治疗目标；狼疮性肾炎（LN）中免疫治疗的有效性和安全性；非免疫治疗的有效性和安全性；治疗持续时间；以及重复肾活检的指征。对每个部分进行了专门的系统文献综述（SLR）。SLR在PubMed、Embase和Cochrane对照试验中心注册库中进行，时间范围为2019年1月至2024年3月。基于中等质量的证据，伴有低度蛋白尿（<500-1000 mg/d）和/或血尿的SLE患者可能具有组织学活动性疾病。高质量的观察性研究表明，在最初6至12个月内达到完全或部分肾脏反应与长期肾脏存活之间存在关联。基于高质量的随机对照试验（RCT），两种免疫抑制剂的联合使用，如贝利木单抗联合吗替麦考酚酯（MMF）/环磷酰胺、伏环孢素联合MMF或奥比妥珠单抗联合MMF，与更高的反应率相关。根据3项具有显著异质性的RCT，停止治疗与复发风险增加相关。高质量的RCT表明，与LN既往标准治疗相比，联合治疗具有获益。在治疗第一年内有反应的患者往往有更好的长期结局。肾活检对于诊断至关重要，但重复活检的作用有待更高质量研究的确认。

items.title: The temporal mortality trend in seropositive and seronegative rheumatoid arthritis: a Danish population-based cohort study.
items.abstract: This study investigated the 5-year all-cause mortality trend for women and men with seropositive versus seronegative rheumatoid arthritis (RA) compared with the background population (BP). Using nationwide registers, a population-based cohort of incident patients with RA diagnosed in Denmark between 2000 and 2014 was identified. Based on immunoglobulin M-rheumatoid factor and/or anticitrullinated peptides, a prespecified algorithm was used to determine the serologic status. The pseudo-observation method was used to determine the cumulative incidence proportion, the age-adjusted risk difference, and the relative risk of mortality. During the study period, the cumulative incidence proportion decreased by at least 50% for both the BP and the RA cohort. The largest change in relative risk was seen for men with seropositive RA compared with seronegative RA, with a relative risk 2000-2004 of 1.1 (95% CI, 0.9-1.4) to a relative risk of 1.4 (95% CI, 1.2-1.7) in 2010-2014. No significant difference was observed for women stratified by serology. Patients with seropositive RA continued to have an excess mortality risk compared with the BP, whereas the relative risk for patients with seronegative RA became similar to the BP. A higher 5-year all-cause mortality risk persisted for patients with seropositive RA compared with the BP. Men with seropositive RA had a higher mortality risk than men with seronegative RA, a difference not seen in women. Future studies are needed to explore the findings of higher mortality risk in seropositive patients and especially the influence of sex and confounders.

items.titleZh: 血清阳性和血清阴性类风湿关节炎的时间死亡率趋势：一项丹麦基于人群的队列研究。
items.abstractZh: 本研究调查了血清阳性与血清阴性类风湿关节炎（RA）女性和男性相比背景人群（BP）的5年全因死亡率趋势。利用全国性登记册，确定了2000年至2014年间在丹麦诊断的RA患者基于人群的队列。基于免疫球蛋白M-类风湿因子和/或抗瓜氨酸肽，使用预设算法确定血清学状态。使用伪观察方法确定累积发病率比例、年龄调整风险差和死亡相对风险。在研究期间，BP和RA队列的累积发病率比例均下降了至少50%。相对风险的最大变化见于血清阳性RA男性与血清阴性RA男性相比，2000-2004年的相对风险为1.1（95% CI，0.9-1.4），2010-2014年升至1.4（95% CI，1.2-1.7）。按血清学分层的女性未观察到显著差异。与BP相比，血清阳性RA患者的超额死亡风险持续存在，而血清阴性RA患者的相对风险变得与BP相似。与BP相比，血清阳性RA患者的5年全因死亡风险持续较高。血清阳性RA男性的死亡风险高于血清阴性RA男性，这一差异在女性中未见。未来需要研究探索血清阳性患者死亡风险较高的发现，特别是性别和混杂因素的影响。

items.title: On the edge of dependency: how older adults with rheumatoid arthritis experience living with frailty.
items.abstract: Up to one third of people with rheumatoid arthritis (RA) are frail, facing increased vulnerability, comorbidities, and psychological challenges. As people with RA live longer, frailty becomes increasingly relevant to clinical care. This study explores how individuals aged ≥65 years with RA experience frailty and how it affects their daily lives and health management. We conducted an explorative qualitative interview study using purposeful sampling. Participants were recruited from a rheumatology outpatient clinic. Inclusion criteria were age ≥65 years, RA diagnosis, a Multidimensional Health Assessment Questionnaire score >1, and a frailty score, assessed using the Clinical Frailty Scale (CFS), of 4 to 7 (living with very mild frailty to severely frail). We aimed for variation in age, sex, and frailty. The individual semistructured interviews were analysed using reflexive thematic analysis. Seventeen participants (10 women, mean age 75 years) were included: 4 living with very mild frailty (CFS score 4), 6 mildly frail (CFS score 5), and 7 moderately frail (CFS score 5). The following 3 themes were developed: (1) 'When frailty distorts the life, you once knew', highlighting the emotional toll of facing physical decline, (2) 'The hard shared burden of frailty', exploring the relational dynamics of frailty, and (3) 'Navigating frailty and RA-balancing unmet needs', emphasising the challenges of balancing autonomy and support. The experience of frailty profoundly shapes the experience of ageing with RA, complicating self-management and challenging both identity and relationships. These findings highlight the need for healthcare systems across sectors to address frailty holistically, supporting both physical and psychosocial needs through coordinated care.

items.title: Pain and its relationship with fatigue in Sjögren disease: an Italian single-centre experience.
items.abstract: Pain is frequently reported by patients with primary Sjögren disease (SD). The 0-10 visual analogue scale (VAS) is broadly used to quantify the extent of pain, but it does not capture its nuances and the impact on the individual's quality of life. The aim of this study was to explore the characteristics of pain and how it is affected by different daily activities in patients with SD. Consecutive patients with SD fulfilling the ACR-EULAR 2016 classification criteria, without fibromyalgia, depression, and/or anxiety disorders, and with a VAS pain >0 were recruited. Patients filled out the McGill Pain Questionnaire, rated their current pain on a 1-5 Likert scale according to previous pain experiences and reported which activities affected their pain. Of 167 screened patients with SD, 131 were enrolled in the study. The mean pain score was 35.5, and it was directly correlated with VAS scales for dryness but not with age, disease duration, and disease activity. The McGill domains used by >80% of patients were those about pressure, sensory, dullness, tension, brightness, and the affective component of pain. Sleep, rest, and mild exercise reduced pain in half of the patients, whereas damp weather changes, fatigue, and tension worsened the pain in up to 81% of patients. Thirty percent of patients reported that pain worsened by intercourse. Although VAS pain is reliable and broadly used in clinical practice and research, multidimensional tools such as the McGill Pain Questionnaire should be used to better understand the individual's experience of pain and establish tailored pharmacologic and nonpharmacologic strategies.

items.titleZh: 干燥综合征中疼痛及其与疲劳的关系：一项意大利单中心经验
items.abstractZh: 疼痛是原发性干燥综合征（SD）患者常报告的症状。0-10视觉模拟量表（VAS）广泛用于量化疼痛程度，但未能捕捉其细微差别及对个体生活质量的影响。本研究旨在探讨SD患者疼痛的特征以及不同日常活动对疼痛的影响。连续纳入符合ACR-EULAR 2016分类标准、无纤维肌痛、抑郁和/或焦虑障碍、且VAS疼痛>0的SD患者。患者填写麦吉尔疼痛问卷，根据既往疼痛体验按1-5 Likert量表评估当前疼痛，并报告哪些活动影响其疼痛。在167名筛查的SD患者中，131名纳入研究。平均疼痛评分为35.5，与干燥VAS评分直接相关，但与年龄、病程和疾病活动度无关。超过80%患者使用的麦吉尔领域涉及压力、感觉、迟钝、紧张、明亮度及疼痛的情感成分。睡眠、休息和轻度运动使半数患者疼痛减轻，而潮湿天气变化、疲劳和紧张使高达81%的患者疼痛加重。30%的患者报告性交加重疼痛。尽管VAS疼痛在临床实践和研究中可靠且广泛使用，但应使用麦吉尔疼痛问卷等多维工具以更好地理解个体的疼痛体验，并制定个体化的药物和非药物策略。

items.title: Effectiveness and safety of antiresorptive drugs in patients with systemic sclerosis-a retrospective monocentric study.
items.abstract: Systemic sclerosis (SSc) is associated with an increased risk of osteoporosis. Gastrointestinal manifestations of SSc such as dysphagia and chronic gastritis affect up to 90% of patients and thus may impair the efficacy and safety of oral antiresorptive treatments. However, data on the comparative effectiveness and safety of antiresorptive therapies in SSc are lacking. Patients with SSc treated for osteoporosis at our rheumatology department between 2004 and 2024 were included if they had at least 2 dual-energy X-ray absorptiometry measurements 2 years apart (before and during antiresorptive therapy). Primary endpoint was the change in bone mineral density (BMD). Secondary endpoints assessed changes in BMD for individual drugs, with a specific focus on oral compared with parenterally administered drugs. Adverse events were documented descriptively. A total of 42 patients were included. Overall, antiresorptive therapy significantly improved axial BMD (+3.78%, p = .012), whereas femoral BMD remained unchanged. Subgroup analysis showed a significant axial BMD increase with parenteral therapy (+5.46%, p = .026, n = 21), but not with oral drugs (n = 21). Denosumab yielded the highest axial BMD gain (+7.51%). Overall, no new fractures occurred. One patient developed stage 1 osteonecrosis of the jaw (ONJ) under ibandronate. Three of 19 patients (16%) developed mild gastrointestinal symptoms. No severe gastrointestinal symptoms occurred. Antiresorptive therapies appear to be effective in patients with SSc. Subgroup analysis suggests that parenteral administration, particularly denosumab, may offer superior efficacy. Gastrointestinal adverse effects were mild and consistent with published rates in the general population, whereas ONJ could be more relevant than in the general population.

items.titleZh: 抗骨吸收药物在系统性硬化症患者中的有效性和安全性——一项回顾性单中心研究
items.abstractZh: 系统性硬化症（SSc）与骨质疏松风险增加相关。SSc的胃肠道表现（如吞咽困难和慢性胃炎）影响高达90%的患者，因此可能损害口服抗骨吸收治疗的有效性和安全性。然而，关于抗骨吸收疗法在SSc中比较有效性和安全性的数据缺乏。纳入2004年至2024年间在我科风湿病科接受骨质疏松治疗的SSc患者，要求至少进行两次间隔2年的双能X线吸收测量（治疗前和治疗期间）。主要终点是骨密度（BMD）的变化。次要终点评估单个药物的BMD变化，特别关注口服与肠外给药药物的比较。不良事件进行描述性记录。共纳入42例患者。总体而言，抗骨吸收治疗显著改善中轴骨BMD（+3.78%，p = .012），而股骨BMD无变化。亚组分析显示，肠外治疗（n = 21）显著增加中轴骨BMD（+5.46%，p = .026），而口服药物（n = 21）无显著变化。地舒单抗获得最高的中轴骨BMD增益（+7.51%）。总体无新发骨折。1例患者在伊班膦酸盐治疗下发生1期颌骨坏死（ONJ）。19例患者中有3例（16%）出现轻度胃肠道症状。无严重胃肠道症状发生。抗骨吸收治疗在SSc患者中似乎有效。亚组分析提示肠外给药（尤其是地舒单抗）可能提供更优疗效。胃肠道不良反应轻微，与普通人群的报道发生率一致，而ONJ可能比普通人群更相关。

items.title: Long-term risk of malignancies in ANCA-associated vasculitis.
items.abstract: Patients with anti-neutrophil cytoplasmic antibodies-associated vasculitis (AAV) have an increased malignancy risk, largely attributed to immunosuppressive therapy. Given the latency period for malignancy development, data on long-term incidence in large AAV cohorts remain limited. This study aimed to assess the cumulative malignancy incidence in patients with AAV from European Vasculitis Society (EUVAS) clinical trials (1995-2012). We analysed 848 patients with AAV from 17 European countries. Data were collected via questionnaires sent to the principal investigators of 7 EUVAS trials. Standardised incidence ratios (SIRs) were calculated using national malignancy databases. At a median follow-up of 8 years (IQR: 2.2-8.8 years), 135 patients experienced 153 malignancies. The overall SIR was 1.40 (95% CI: 1.18-1.64), primarily driven by nonmelanoma skin cancer (NMSC; SIR: 3.52; 95% CI: 2.6-4.7). Excluding NMSC, the SIR was 1.17 (0.96-1.4). The most common malignancies were NMSC (62 cases), prostate (11.1%), and lung (9.8%). The incidence of first malignancy was 2.01 per 100 person-years (95% CI: 1.70-2.39). Cumulative malignancy incidence was 10.8% at 5 years, 19% at 10 years, and 38.2% at 20 years. Patients diagnosed before the age of 40 years had a 30-fold increased risk of NMSC (SIR: 30; 95% CI: 6.03-87.65). Cyclophosphamide use for >6 months, azathioprine duration, and age >65 years were independent risk factors. The diagnosis of malignancy predicted worse survival (log-rank = 9.2; P = .002). Patients with AAV have a significantly increased risk of NMSC, particularly younger individuals, while solid tumour risk is not significantly elevated. Prolonged cyclophosphamide and azathioprine use were associated with malignancy development.

items.title: Altered somatosensory profiles in rheumatoid arthritis, psoriatic arthritis, axial spondyloarthritis, and systemic sclerosis.
items.abstract: This exploratory study aimed to examine the somatosensory profiles of patients with rheumatoid arthritis (RA), psoriatic arthritis (PsA), axial spondyloarthritis (axSpA), and systemic sclerosis (SSc) using quantitative sensory testing (QST). We sought to identify distinct patterns of sensory alterations to enhance the understanding of pain mechanisms in these conditions and to generate hypotheses for future mechanistic research and therapy approaches. Patients with RA, PsA, axSpA, and SSc underwent QST on both hands to evaluate all somatosensory submodalities. Standardised assessment, following the German Research Network on Neuropathic Pain protocol, included mechanical detection threshold (MDT) and vibration detection threshold (VDT) as well as thermal detection and pain thresholds. We enrolled 80 patients (20 with RA, PsA, axSpA, SSc) and 20 controls. Significant differences in MDT (RA: β = 0.90, P =.025; PsA: β = 1.30, P =.001; axSpA: β = 0.80, P =.045; SSc: β = 0.86, P =.030) and VDT (RA: β = -0.33, P =.003; PsA: β = -0.23, P =.033; axSpA: β = -0.30, P =.006; SSc: β = -0.17, P =.126) were observed compared with controls. All disease groups exhibited pathological allodynia (RA: 15%, PsA: 25%, axSpA: 15%, SSc: 5%, and controls: 0%), with sensory processing alterations occurring independently of inflamed areas. No association was found between QST-detected sensory alterations and disease activity, duration, or inflammatory markers. Patients with RA, PsA, axSpA, and SSc demonstrate significant alterations in somatosensory processing, including abnormal MDT and VDT, and pathological allodynia that appear independent of inflamed areas. These sensory changes do not correlate with disease activity, duration, inflammatory markers, or therapeutic approach, indicating that they may result from mechanisms distinct from inflammation.

items.title: The distinct phenotype of subclinical giant cell arteritis in polymyalgia rheumatica: evidence from a PMR fast-track clinic.
items.abstract: To define the prevalence and phenotype of subclinical giant cell arteritis (sGCA) in newly diagnosed polymyalgia rheumatica (PMR). This prospective study assessed consecutive patients referred from primary care to a fast-track clinic (FTC) with suspected PMR without GCA features. Patients were compared with a control population which consisted of newly diagnosed, consecutive patients with GCA from an FTC. Assessment included temporal and axillary artery ultrasound and quantitative scoring using Halo count (HC), Halo score (HS), and OMERACT GCA Ultrasound Score (OGUS). Patients with PMR with positive vascular ultrasound findings were diagnosed as sGCA. Cardiovascular risk (American College of Cardiology/American Heart Association Atherosclerotic Cardiovascular disease [ASCVD] score) was calculated. Seventy-three new PMR and 24 new patients with GCA were included. Twenty-five percent of patients with PMR had ultrasound-confirmed sGCA. Although predominantly male (80% vs 45%), sGCA could not be otherwise clinically differentiated. PMR with sGCA had more extracranial involvement than GCA (47% vs 33%) with lower baseline OGUS scores (0.81 [±0.17] vs 0.96 [±0.21], P = .02). Patients with sGCA relapsed earlier than PMR or GCA. An initial decline in sGCA ultrasound scores was followed by a significant increase. Ultrasound scores in sGCA were independent of cardiovascular risk (ASCVD score). This study found that 1 in 5 patients with PMR referred from primary care via an FTC have sGCA. sGCA has a distinct ultrasound phenotype from GCA, with lower vessel wall inflammation quantified by the OGUS, than observed in GCA. A higher clinical and ultrasound relapse rate in patients with sGCA may support closer monitoring and intensive treatment of these patients.

items.titleZh: 风湿性多肌痛中亚临床巨细胞动脉炎的独特表型：来自PMR快速通道门诊的证据
items.abstractZh: 旨在定义新诊断的风湿性多肌痛（PMR）中亚临床巨细胞动脉炎（sGCA）的患病率和表型。这项前瞻性研究评估了从初级保健转诊至快速通道门诊（FTC）的疑似PMR且无GCA特征的患者。患者与来自FTC的新诊断、连续的GCA患者组成的对照组进行比较。评估包括颞动脉和腋动脉超声检查，以及使用晕圈计数（HC）、晕圈评分（HS）和OMERACT GCA超声评分（OGUS）进行定量评分。血管超声检查阳性的PMR患者被诊断为sGCA。计算心血管风险（美国心脏病学会/美国心脏协会动脉粥样硬化性心血管疾病[ASCVD]评分）。共纳入73例新发PMR患者和24例新发GCA患者。25%的PMR患者经超声确诊为sGCA。尽管sGCA患者以男性为主（80% vs 45%），但临床上无法进一步区分。与GCA相比，sGCA的PMR患者有更多的颅外受累（47% vs 33%），且基线OGUS评分较低（0.81 [±0.17] vs 0.96 [±0.21]，P = .02）。sGCA患者比PMR或GCA患者复发更早。sGCA超声评分在初始下降后出现显著升高。sGCA的超声评分与心血管风险（ASCVD评分）无关。本研究发现，通过FTC从初级保健转诊的PMR患者中，每5人中有1人患有sGCA。sGCA具有与GCA不同的超声表型，通过OGUS量化的血管壁炎症程度低于GCA。sGCA患者较高的临床和超声复发率可能支持对这些患者进行更密切的监测和强化治疗。

items.title: Patient self-assessment and virtual visit-based treatment decisions in rheumatoid arthritis: results from the multicentre Telemedicine in Rheumatoid Arthritis trial.
items.abstract: The growing shortage of rheumatologists threatens rheumatology care. Patient self-assessment and asynchronous virtual visits may improve efficiency. This study assessed the concordance of face-to-face (F2F) and virtual visit-based treatment decisions in individuals with rheumatoid arthritis (RA), incorporating patient self-assessment. This prospective 3-month multicentre trial recruited RA patients across 4 university centres in Germany. Patients used a medical app to document the results of a self-performed C-reactive protein (CRP) test, joint count, therapeutic suggestions, and electronic patient-reported outcomes (ePROs) before their regular F2F consultations and ePROs on a weekly basis in-between consultations. Independent tele-rheumatologists provided treatment recommendations based on these data. The primary outcome was the level of agreement between tele-rheumatologists and patients on treatment decisions (escalation, unchanged, de-escalation), compared with F2F rheumatologists' decisions. Secondary outcomes included change in patient activation (Patient Activation Measure [PAM]) and in patient-perceived ability to assess their disease activity. A total of 208 consultations and 114 patients (80.7% female, mean age 51.6 years) were included. Most often (63%), treatment remained unchanged, whereas 24% required escalation and 14% de-escalation. F2F treatment decisions aligned with tele-rheumatologist decisions in 77% of cases and patient suggestions in 67% of cases. The accuracy of tele-rheumatologist decisions was 77% for maintaining treatment, 87% for de-escalation, and 91% for escalation. No significant changes in patient activation and patients' ability to assess their disease activity were observed. The study demonstrated substantial agreement between virtual asynchronous and F2F treatment decisions. However, further refinement of asynchronous care models and validation studies is crucial.

items.titleZh: 类风湿关节炎患者自我评估与基于虚拟就诊的治疗决策：多中心远程医疗在类风湿关节炎试验中的结果
items.abstractZh: 风湿病专科医生的日益短缺威胁着风湿病护理。患者自我评估和异步虚拟就诊可能提高效率。本研究评估了类风湿关节炎（RA）患者面对面（F2F）与基于虚拟就诊的治疗决策的一致性，并纳入患者自我评估。这项前瞻性3个月多中心试验在德国4个大学中心招募了RA患者。患者在常规F2F就诊前使用医疗应用程序记录自行完成的C反应蛋白（CRP）检测结果、关节计数、治疗建议和电子患者报告结局（ePRO），并在就诊间隔期间每周记录ePRO。独立远程风湿病专家根据这些数据提供治疗建议。主要结局是远程风湿病专家与患者之间治疗决策（升级、不变、降级）的一致性水平，与F2F风湿病专家的决策进行比较。次要结局包括患者激活（患者激活测量[PAM]）和患者感知评估自身疾病活动能力的变化。共纳入208次就诊和114名患者（80.7%为女性，平均年龄51.6岁）。最常见的情况（63%）是治疗保持不变，而24%需要升级，14%需要降级。F2F治疗决策与远程风湿病专家决策在77%的病例中一致，与患者建议在67%的病例中一致。远程风湿病专家决策的准确性为：维持治疗77%，降级87%，升级91%。未观察到患者激活和患者评估自身疾病活动能力有显著变化。该研究证明了虚拟异步与F2F治疗决策之间具有实质性一致性。然而，进一步优化异步护理模型和验证研究至关重要。

items.title: Association of metabolic syndrome and its components with systemic lupus erythematosus.
items.abstract: Systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) patients might manifest an increased prevalence of Metabolic syndrome (MetS) components like insulin resistance, obesity, and dyslipidemia. Here we aimed to assess the interconnection between MetS components and SLE and attempted to divulge the potential contribution of MetS on SLE development. We enrolled 200 cases with SLE whose diagnosis was accomplished by American College of Rheumatology (ACR) criteria. MetS diagnosed was accomplished through the International Diabetes Federation (IDF) criteria. The frequency of MetS among the SLE population was 28.5%. SLEDAI was not significantly different between SLE cases with and without MetS (P = 0.3519). CRP level was significantly higher in the SLE cases with MetS compared to those without MetS (P = 0.0412). BMI, FBS, WC (both in males and females), total cholesterol, TG, and LDL were significantly higher in SLE subjects with MetS compared to those without MetS. However, in both males and females, HDL level was significantly lower in SLE subjects with MetS compared to those without MetS. Obesity, CVD, T2D, dyslipidemia, and hypertension were more prevalent in MetS cases among the SLE population. An increased prevalence of MetS in the SLE population was observed, while these patients did not have worsen disease severity. All conventional components of MetS were associated with MetS development in the SLE population. Not applicable.

items.titleZh: 代谢综合征及其组分与系统性红斑狼疮的关联
items.abstractZh: 系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）患者可能表现出代谢综合征（MetS）组分（如胰岛素抵抗、肥胖和血脂异常）患病率增加。本研究旨在评估MetS组分与SLE之间的相互关联，并试图揭示MetS对SLE发展的潜在贡献。我们纳入了200例符合美国风湿病学会（ACR）诊断标准的SLE患者。MetS的诊断依据国际糖尿病联盟（IDF）标准。SLE人群中MetS的频率为28.5%。有和无MetS的SLE患者之间SLEDAI无显著差异（P = 0.3519）。有MetS的SLE患者CRP水平显著高于无MetS者（P = 0.0412）。有MetS的SLE患者BMI、FBS、WC（男性和女性）、总胆固醇、TG和LDL均显著高于无MetS者。然而，在男性和女性中，有MetS的SLE患者HDL水平显著低于无MetS者。在SLE人群中，MetS患者中肥胖、CVD、T2D、血脂异常和高血压更为常见。观察到SLE人群中MetS患病率增加，但这些患者的疾病严重程度并未加重。所有常规MetS组分均与SLE人群中MetS的发生相关。不适用。

items.title: The value of arthroscopic synovectomy in the treatment of rheumatoid arthritis: A prospective cohort study.
items.abstract: The aim of this study is to investigate the effect of arthroscopic synovectomy (AS) on disease status in patients with rheumatoid arthritis (RA). A prospective study was conducted among patients with RA who underwent AS of the elbow or knee joints due to persistent swelling following conventional treatment, as well as control individuals who only received conventional treatment. All patients were evaluated at baseline and 4, 12, 24, 48, 96 weeks after AS. The coprimary outcomes were week 96 disease activity score (DAS)-28 remission and American College of Rheumatology improvement criteria (ACR20/50/70) remission. Key secondary outcomes were changes from baseline to week 96 in Mayo score, Lysoholm score, Health Assessment questionnaire (HAQ), patient's visual analogue scale, Magnetic Resonance Imaging in AS group. The correlation between synovial tissue biology and clinical response was analyzed. A total of 51 patients were included, with 17 accepted AS and conventional treatment, 34 only accepted conventional treatment. At week 96, more patients in AS group achieved DAS-28 remission [52.9% (9/17) vs 11.8% (4/34), P = 0.005] and ACR70 response [35.3% (6/11) vs 5.9% (2/34), P = 0.021] compared with control group. In AS group, DAS28 score [3.9 (3.7, 4.4) vs 2.8 (2.2, 3.4), P = 0.0002], MAYO score [52.5, (45.3, 62.8) vs 72 (60. 76.3), P = 0.021], Lysoholm score [55.5 (50, 59.5) vs 67.5 (63, 78), P = 0.020] and HAQ [4 (1, 6) vs 1 (0, 2), P = 0.034] improved significantly at week 4, 4, 12 and 48 respectively, and persisted until week 96. An increase in disease activity after AS was exclusively noted in the diffuse myeloid group. The disease activity and joint function of RA patients who underwent AS showed considerable improvement after surgery, which suggests that AS may enhance the likelihood of achieving remission in patients who had been treated with multiple DMARDs but have not achieved remission. Key Points • The rate of patients achieved disease remission in AS group at week 96 endpoint was better than that of the conventional treatment group. • Patients with RA after AS showed sustained improvement in disease activity and joint function, which remained stable for 96 weeks. • Only patients with diffuse myeloid synovial pathology exhibit increased disease activity.

items.titleZh: 关节镜下滑膜切除术治疗类风湿关节炎的价值：一项前瞻性队列研究
items.abstractZh: 本研究旨在探讨关节镜下滑膜切除术（AS）对类风湿关节炎（RA）患者疾病状态的影响。对接受肘关节或膝关节AS（因常规治疗后持续肿胀）的RA患者以及仅接受常规治疗的对照组进行前瞻性研究。所有患者在基线及AS后4、12、24、48、96周进行评估。共同主要结局是第96周疾病活动评分（DAS）-28缓解和美国风湿病学会改善标准（ACR20/50/70）缓解。关键次要结局是AS组从基线到第96周Mayo评分、Lysoholm评分、健康评估问卷（HAQ）、患者视觉模拟量表、磁共振成像的变化。分析滑膜组织生物学与临床反应的相关性。共纳入51例患者，其中17例接受AS和常规治疗，34例仅接受常规治疗。第96周时，AS组达到DAS-28缓解的患者更多[52.9%（9/17） vs 11.8%（4/34），P = 0.005]，ACR70应答也更多[35.3%（6/11） vs 5.9%（2/34），P = 0.021]。在AS组中，DAS28评分[3.9（3.7, 4.4） vs 2.8（2.2, 3.4），P = 0.0002]、MAYO评分[52.5（45.3, 62.8） vs 72（60, 76.3），P = 0.021]、Lysoholm评分[55.5（50, 59.5） vs 67.5（63, 78），P = 0.020]和HAQ[4（1, 6） vs 1（0, 2），P = 0.034]分别在第4、4、12和48周显著改善，并持续至第96周。仅在弥漫性髓系组中观察到AS后疾病活动增加。接受AS的RA患者术后疾病活动和关节功能显著改善，这表明AS可能提高接受多种DMARDs治疗但未缓解的患者达到缓解的可能性。关键点 • AS组在第96周终点达到疾病缓解的患者比例优于常规治疗组。 • RA患者AS后疾病活动和关节功能持续改善，并稳定维持96周。 • 仅弥漫性髓系滑膜病理患者表现出疾病活动增加。

items.title: Comparing the effects of two occupational therapy programmes on selected indicators in women with rheumatoid arthritis: a randomised controlled trial.
items.abstract: Rheumatoid arthritis is one of the most common autoimmune diseases in the world. That is why new effective methods for the conservative treatment of this disease are constantly being sought. Unfortunately, there is still a lack of scientific reports on the effective use of occupational therapy as a method of conservative treatment among this group of individuals. Therefore, the aim of our research is to compare the effectiveness of two occupational therapeutic programmes based on art therapy and computer technology among women with rheumatoid arthritis. A group of 55 women between the age of 50-70 years with diagnosed rheumatoid arthritis in remission, with a disease duration between five and 10 years took, part in the research. Participants were randomly (a coin toss, performed by the main author) assigned to one of three groups: Group P (Pablo ® System therapy), Group A (art therapy), and Group C (control, no therapeutic intervention). All of the examined women were residents of the same large city, the average age in the examined groups being: Group P - 59.95 years, Group A - 61.79 years, and Group C - 61.47 years. The original therapeutic programme in Groups P and A was carried out individually with each patient, three times a week, for six weeks. The primary outcomes were to measure body mass (Tanita scale), body height (Martin type anthropometer) and identify the most difficult activity to perform (Canadian Occupational Performance Measure Questionnaire). The effects of therapy were assessed using the 25 Hole Pegboard Test (dexterity and hand-eye coordination), the Pablo ® System (range of motion in the wrists: extension, flexion, intra-radial adduction and ulnar adduction), the Numeric Rating Scale (pain intensity) and the 36-Item Short Form Health Survey (quality of life). The research project was a quantitative study, lasting from October to December 2025. It was conducted at the Occupational Therapy Workshop, part of the Central Research Laboratory of the University of Physical Culture in Kraków, Poland. Statistical analysis was performed using the t -test for dependent samples and one-way analysis of variance (ANOVA). Women from the study groups did not differ statistically significantly in terms of age, body mass, body height or Body Mass Index. Statistically significant results for comparisons between measurements were obtained in Group P for the dominant limb: dexterity (p < 0.001; 29.82-32.57 95%CI), wrist extension (p < 0.001; 57.86-65.40 95% CI), wrist flexion (p < 0.001; 64.70-71.40 95%CI), wrist intra-radial adduction (p < 0.001; 15.69-17.46 95%CI), wrist ulnar adduction (p < 0.001), and for the non-dominant limb: dexterity (p < 0.001; 29.59-32.43 95% CI), wrist extension (p < 0.001; 58.25-66.38 95%CI), wrist flexion (p < 0.001; 66.61-72.02 95%CI), wrist intra-radial adduction (p < 0.001; 15.28-17.14 95%CI) and wrist ulnar adduction (p < 0.001; 25.41-32.80 95%CI). For Group P, statistically significant results were also observed in comparisons between measurements of pain intensity (p < 0.001; 3.02-3.82) and in the physical area of quality of life (p < 0.026; 48.38-54.02). In Group A, such changes were observed only in pain intensity (p = 0.011; 3.72-4.59 95%CI). The results obtained during the study suggest that occupational therapy using the Pablo system may be more effective than art therapy in improving upper limb function among women with rheumatoid arthritis, especially in terms of functional parameters and quality of life regarding its physical component.

items.titleZh: 比较两种职业治疗方案对类风湿关节炎女性患者选定指标的影响：一项随机对照试验
items.abstractZh: 类风湿关节炎是世界上最常见的自身免疫性疾病之一。因此，人们不断寻求新的有效保守治疗方法。遗憾的是，关于职业治疗作为该类患者保守治疗方法的有效性的科学报告仍然缺乏。因此，本研究的目的是比较基于艺术疗法和计算机技术的两种职业治疗方案对类风湿关节炎女性患者的有效性。研究对象为55名年龄在50-70岁之间、确诊为类风湿关节炎且处于缓解期、病程在5至10年之间的女性。参与者被随机（由主要作者进行抛硬币）分配到三组之一：P组（Pablo®系统治疗）、A组（艺术治疗）和C组（对照组，无治疗干预）。所有受试女性均居住在同一大城市，各组平均年龄分别为：P组59.95岁，A组61.79岁，C组61.47岁。P组和A组的原始治疗方案为每周三次、每次针对每位患者单独进行，持续六周。主要结局指标包括测量体重（Tanita秤）、身高（Martin型人体测量仪）并识别最困难的活动（加拿大职业表现测量问卷）。治疗效果通过25孔插板测试（灵巧性和手眼协调）、Pablo®系统（腕关节活动范围：伸展、屈曲、桡偏和尺偏）、数字评分量表（疼痛强度）和36项简短健康调查（生活质量）进行评估。该研究项目为定量研究，于2025年10月至12月进行，地点为波兰克拉科夫体育大学中央研究实验室的职业治疗工作室。统计分析采用配对样本t检验和单因素方差分析（ANOVA）。研究组女性在年龄、体重、身高或体重指数方面无统计学显著差异。P组在优势肢体的以下指标中获得了测量间比较的统计学显著结果：灵巧性（p < 0.001；95%CI 29.82-32.57）、腕伸展（p < 0.001；95%CI 57.86-65.40）、腕屈曲（p < 0.001；95%CI 64.70-71.40）、腕桡偏（p < 0.001；95%CI 15.69-17.46）、腕尺偏（p < 0.001）；非优势肢体：灵巧性（p < 0.001；95%CI 29.59-32.43）、腕伸展（p < 0.001；95%CI 58.25-66.38）、腕屈曲（p < 0.001；95%CI 66.61-72.02）、腕桡偏（p < 0.001；95%CI 15.28-17.14）、腕尺偏（p < 0.001；95%CI 25.41-32.80）。P组在疼痛强度（p < 0.001；95%CI 3.02-3.82）和生活质量躯体领域（p < 0.026；95%CI 48.38-54.02）的测量间比较中也观察到统计学显著结果。在A组中，仅在疼痛强度方面观察到此类变化（p = 0.011；95%CI 3.72-4.59）。研究结果表明，使用Pablo系统的职业治疗在改善类风湿关节炎女性患者的上肢功能方面可能比艺术治疗更有效，尤其是在功能参数和生活质量的躯体成分方面。

items.title: Glucocorticoid monotherapy versus combination with methotrexate or tocilizumab in giant cell arteritis: efficacy and safety at 78 weeks in a retrospective cohort study.
items.abstract: The classic treatment for giant cell arteritis (GCA) is based on glucocorticoids (GC), whose prolonged use causes adverse effects. Therefore, GC-sparing drugs are used, although few direct comparative studies exist. We assessed the efficacy and safety of GC monotherapy (GC mono ), GC with methotrexate (GC+MTX), and GC with tocilizumab (GC+TCZ). Retrospective cohort study of patients with GCA. A composite endpoint (REACT-G) was defined that included relapses, serious infections, and GC-related adverse events at 78 weeks, and the cumulative dose of GC was analyzed. A total of 52 patients were included; 15 received GC mono , 30 received GC+MTX, and 7 received GC+TCZ. The REACT-G endpoint occurred in 27 patients, mainly due to relapses. GC+TCZ was associated with a lower REACT-G rate (14%) than GC mono (67%) and GC+MTX (53%) (p=0.082). In the GC+MTX group, the REACT-G was lower with higher doses of MTX (p=0.009). In the multivariate analysis, the use of GC+TCZ was the only independent protective factor against REACT-G (p=0.038). The cumulative GC dose at 78 weeks was higher in the GC mono group (7143.7±2977.7mg) than in GC+MTX group (5273.2±1745.3mg; p=0.032) and GC+TCZ group (3733.9±2286.8mg; p=0.005). In the multivariate analysis, only the GC+TCZ group accumulated significantly lower GC doses (p=0.034). Compared with GC mono , GC+TCZ combination was associated with a significant reduction in REACT-G events in the multivariate analysis and a lower cumulative dose of GC at 78 weeks. The benefit of GC+MTX was moderate and, like the prevention of REACT-G events, appears to be dose-dependent.

items.title: Social appearance anxiety and its associations with anxiety, depressive symptoms, and health-related quality of life in systemic sclerosis: a cross-sectional study.
items.abstract: This study aimed to evaluate social appearance anxiety in patients with systemic sclerosis compared with healthy controls and to examine its associations with anxiety, depressive symptoms, health-related quality of life, and disease-related clinical features. This cross-sectional study included 71 patients with systemic sclerosis and 38 healthy controls. Social appearance anxiety was assessed using the Social Appearance Anxiety Scale. Anxiety and depressive symptoms were evaluated using the Hospital Anxiety and Depression Scale, and health-related quality of life was assessed using the Short Form-36. Disease-related variables, including modified Rodnan skin score and EUSTAR disease activity index, were recorded. Patients with systemic sclerosis had higher Social Appearance Anxiety Scale scores than healthy controls [32.0 (21.0-51.5) vs. 19.0 (16.25-34.0); p = 0.003]. Anxiety and depressive symptom scores were also higher in patients with systemic sclerosis. In systemic sclerosis, social appearance anxiety correlated positively with anxiety symptoms and negatively with several health-related quality-of-life domains. No significant association was observed between social appearance anxiety and modified Rodnan skin score or EUSTAR disease activity index. Social appearance anxiety is increased in systemic sclerosis and is associated with psychological distress and impaired health-related quality of life rather than conventional disease activity or skin thickness measures. These findings support incorporating psychosocial assessment into routine systemic sclerosis care. Key Points • Patients with systemic sclerosis had higher social appearance anxiety than healthy controls. • Social appearance anxiety was associated with anxiety symptoms and impaired health-related quality of life. • Social appearance anxiety was not significantly associated with skin thickness or EUSTAR disease activity. • Psychosocial assessment may provide clinically relevant information in systemic sclerosis care.

items.titleZh: 系统性硬化症患者社交外貌焦虑及其与焦虑、抑郁症状和健康相关生活质量的关系：一项横断面研究
items.abstractZh: 本研究旨在评估系统性硬化症患者与健康对照者相比的社交外貌焦虑，并探讨其与焦虑、抑郁症状、健康相关生活质量及疾病相关临床特征的关系。这项横断面研究纳入71例系统性硬化症患者和38例健康对照者。使用社交外貌焦虑量表评估社交外貌焦虑。采用医院焦虑抑郁量表评估焦虑和抑郁症状，使用简短健康调查量表-36评估健康相关生活质量。记录疾病相关变量，包括改良Rodnan皮肤评分和EUSTAR疾病活动指数。系统性硬化症患者的社交外貌焦虑量表评分高于健康对照者[32.0（21.0-51.5） vs. 19.0（16.25-34.0）；p = 0.003]。系统性硬化症患者的焦虑和抑郁症状评分也更高。在系统性硬化症中，社交外貌焦虑与焦虑症状呈正相关，与多个健康相关生活质量领域呈负相关。社交外貌焦虑与改良Rodnan皮肤评分或EUSTAR疾病活动指数之间未观察到显著关联。系统性硬化症中社交外貌焦虑增加，且与心理困扰和健康相关生活质量受损相关，而非与常规疾病活动或皮肤厚度指标相关。这些发现支持将心理社会评估纳入系统性硬化症的常规护理。关键点 • 系统性硬化症患者的社交外貌焦虑高于健康对照者。 • 社交外貌焦虑与焦虑症状和健康相关生活质量受损相关。 • 社交外貌焦虑与皮肤厚度或EUSTAR疾病活动无显著关联。 • 心理社会评估可能为系统性硬化症护理提供临床相关信息。

items.title: TNF inhibitors for the long-term management of juvenile idiopathic arthritis associated uveitis: real-life data from the ITHACA cohort.
items.abstract: We assess prescription patterns and describe the long-term real-life effectiveness of different TNF inhibitors (TNFis) in juvenile idiopathic arthritis-related uveitis (JIA-U). Patients with JIA-U treated with TNFi were retrospectively enrolled. Ninety-six JIA-U patients (77% female) with an age at diagnosis of 2.44 [interquartile range (IQR) 1.56-3.81] and a median follow-up of 19 years were included. Adalimumab was the most frequently prescribed TNFi (61%), followed by etanercept (19%), infliximab (15%), and golimumab (5%). Overall, adalimumab showed the lowest complication rate (51%; p  < 0.001) and median number of uveitis relapse (1; IQR 0-2; p  = 0.012). Conversely, etanercept showed the highest median number of uveitis relapses (4; IQR 1-5). The cumulative incidence curves for 'uveitis relapse' were similar among TNFi. Conversely, when 'treatment change' was considered as the event, a significantly higher risk for patients treated with infliximab compared with those receiving adalimumab emerged (HR 3.06, 95% CI 1.41-6.63; p  < 0.01). All TNFis appear to be effective for long-term management of JIA-U. We observed some differences in the number of uveitis relapses and ocular complication rates favoring adalimumab over infliximab and etanercept, findings that need to be further confirmed in prospective studies.

items.titleZh: TNF抑制剂用于幼年特发性关节炎相关葡萄膜炎的长期管理：来自ITHACA队列的真实世界数据
items.abstractZh: 我们评估了不同TNF抑制剂（TNFis）在幼年特发性关节炎相关葡萄膜炎（JIA-U）中的处方模式，并描述了其长期真实世界有效性。回顾性纳入接受TNFi治疗的JIA-U患者。共纳入96例JIA-U患者（77%为女性），诊断年龄为2.44岁[四分位距（IQR）1.56-3.81]，中位随访时间为19年。阿达木单抗是最常处方的TNFi（61%），其次是依那西普（19%）、英夫利西单抗（15%）和戈利木单抗（5%）。总体而言，阿达木单抗的并发症发生率最低（51%；p < 0.001），葡萄膜炎复发中位数最低（1；IQR 0-2；p = 0.012）。相反，依那西普的葡萄膜炎复发中位数最高（4；IQR 1-5）。各TNFi的“葡萄膜炎复发”累积发生率曲线相似。然而，当以“治疗变更”作为事件时，与接受阿达木单抗治疗的患者相比，接受英夫利西单抗治疗的患者风险显著更高（HR 3.06，95% CI 1.41-6.63；p < 0.01）。所有TNFi似乎对JIA-U的长期管理均有效。我们观察到在葡萄膜炎复发次数和眼部并发症发生率方面存在一些差异，阿达木单抗优于英夫利西单抗和依那西普，这些发现需在前瞻性研究中进一步证实。

items.title: A Possible Case of Drug-induced ANCA-associated Vasculitis Associated with Mirabegron.
items.abstract: Mirabegron, a β3-adrenoceptor agonist used for treating overactive bladder, has recently been identified in pharmacovigilance analyses as a potential signal for drug-induced myeloperoxidase (MPO) antineutrophil cytoplasmic antibody (ANCA)-associated vasculitis (AAV), although detailed clinical reports are lacking. We herein describe a patient who developed MPO-ANCA-positive vasculitis approximately 1 year after mirabegron initiation. The patient presented with inflammatory symptoms, elevated MPO-ANCA and C-reactive protein levels, and hematuria, with an improvement following drug discontinuation, thus allowing for the withdrawal of immunosuppressive therapy within 1 year. Causality was assessed as "probable/likely" using the WHO-UMC system. This case highlights the importance of early recognition and prompt drug withdrawal in cases of drug-induced AAV.

items.title: Soluble urokinase plasminogen activator receptor (suPAR) is associated with intrarenal chronicity features on diagnostic and repeat kidney biopsies in lupus nephritis.
items.abstract: Soluble urokinase plasminogen activator receptor (suPAR) is linked to organ damage in systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE). We investigated whether serum suPAR associates with histological activity and chronicity in diagnostic and 12-month repeat kidney biopsies in lupus nephritis (LN). suPAR levels were determined using ELISA in serum samples from 23 LN patients (19 incident) before and 12 months after initiation of immunosuppressive therapy, and from 15 age- and sex-matched healthy controls. Correlations with NIH activity index (AI) and chronicity index (CI) scores were assessed using Spearman's rank correlation coefficient. suPAR levels were higher at active LN than in controls (5.37±0.93 ng/mL versus 2.64±0.97 ng/mL; p<0.001), decreased by month 12 (3.77±0.94 ng/mL; p=0.005), but remained elevated compared with controls (p<0.001). Baseline suPAR did not correlate with AI at baseline (rho=0.202; p=0.368) or month 12 (rho=0.332; p=0.165), whereas month-12 suPAR correlated with month-12 AI (rho=0.595; p=0.007). Baseline suPAR correlated with CI at baseline (rho=0.541; p=0.008) and month 12 (rho=0.554; p=0.017). Month-12 suPAR showed a trend towards a correlation with month-12 CI (rho=0.440; p=0.066). Baseline suPAR correlated with baseline interstitial fibrosis (rho=0.422; p=0.044) and predicted month-12 glomerular sclerosis (rho=0.580; p=0.011) and tubular atrophy (rho=0.477; p=0.045). Month-12 suPAR correlated with month-12 glomerular sclerosis (rho=0.572; p=0.013). Serum suPAR levels were elevated in active LN and, despite a decline, after 12 months of treatment compared with healthy individuals. suPAR levels correlated with intrarenal chronicity and predicted post-treatment glomerular sclerosis and tubular atrophy, suggesting suPAR as a potential biomarker of kidney damage in LN.
